mapper.sql: rhi.re_id as rri_id, rhi.hobby, rhi.level_myself, rhi.level_mechanism, rhi.remarks, rhi.attribute1, rhi.attribute2, rhi.attribute3, rhi.enabled_flag, rhi.id, rhi.update_time, rhi.create_by, rhi.create_time, rhi.update_by

${tAlias}.re_id as ${tAlias}_rri_id, ${tAlias}.hobby as ${tAlias}_hobby, ${tAlias}.level_myself as ${tAlias}_level_myself, ${tAlias}.level_mechanism as ${tAlias}_level_mechanism, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into re_hobby_interface (re_id, hobby, level_myself, level_mechanism, remarks, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, update_time, create_by, create_time, update_by) values (#{recruitmentInterface.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{hobby,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{levelMyself,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{levelMechanism,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update re_hobby_interface set re_id = #{recruitmentInterface.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, hobby = #{hobby,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, level_myself = #{levelMyself,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, level_mechanism = #{levelMechanism,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
